site_analysis_review.platform_notes: Confirmed Episerver CMS with React hydration. Platform class names include SiteHeader, AutoSuggest, NudgeBar. Unbxd SDK loaded. Consistent with site analysis.
site_analysis_review.anti_bot_notes: No anti-bot protection confirmed. AU site returns full 200 response via direct HTTP with 314K chars of HTML. Cloudflare used only as CDN for image optimization (cdn-cgi/image). No CAPTCHA, no JS challenge, no rate limiting.
site_analysis_review.mechanism_notes: http_requests with JSON-LD extraction confirmed as correct mechanism. AU site is fully SSR — no JS rendering needed for JSON-LD or HTML content.
site_analysis_review.nz_site_details: NZ site (adairs.co.nz) serves a maintenance page with title 'Adairs | New Zealand' and h1 'An Update for Our New Zealand Customers'. No product data, no JSON-LD, no navigation. Playwright probe returns 200 with 45K chars but only maintenance content.

corrections.actual: playwright_none was the method that worked for NZ (direct_http likely returned maintenance page too, but probe classified it as playwright_none). For AU, direct_http works perfectly.
Confirmed: Block 1 is BreadcrumbList, Block 2 is Product with offers=present (NOT empty). JSON-LD has complete data.

nz_site.notes: NZ site returns maintenance page. No product data available.

au_site_mirror.notes: AU site fully operational with complete SSR HTML. NZ site will use identical structure when active.

extraction_methods.notes: JSON-LD provides ALL core fields plus extras (reviews, ratings, brand, images). No need for CSS selectors as primary. CSS selectors serve as fallback only.

jsonld_extraction.parsing_strategy: Parse all JSON-LD blocks, find the one with @type (or type) == 'Product'

description.example: Buy our Stonewashed Cotton Chocolate Brown Sheet Separates at Adairs. OEKO-TEX cotton sheets with a soft, textured finish. Shop online today.

price_display.notes: AggregateOffer gives price range. Use lowPrice as primary 'from' price.

currency.notes: AU site returns AUD. NZ site will return NZD when active.

review_count.notes: Note: reviewCount=0 but individual reviews exist in .review array. Discrepancy in source data.

example: Fitted Sheets, Flat Sheets & Sheet Sets

url.notes: Use canonical URL or og:url. JSON-LD offers.url also available.

status_code.notes: HTTP status code from request response.

title.notes: Title in JSON-LD matches product page title. No ' | Adairs' suffix in JSON-LD name.

price.notes: AggregateOffer provides lowPrice/highPrice range. lowPrice is the 'from' price. CSS fallback unknown as Playwright unavailable for selector testing. Price likely in React-rendered components with class names from app.min.css.

original_price.notes: JSON-LD only provides lowPrice/highPrice. No 'was'/'original' price in structured data. May exist in HTML markup for sale items but not testable without Playwright.

currency.notes: AU site returns 'AUD'. NZ site will return 'NZD' when active.

availability.notes: Parse URL to extract status: 'InStock', 'OutOfStock', 'PreOrder', etc.

examples: Buy our Stonewashed Cotton Chocolate Brown Sheet Separates at Adairs. OEKO-TEX cotton sheets with a soft, textured finish. Shop online today.

images.notes: JSON-LD provides array of 9 image URLs. First image matches og:image. Images hosted on globalassets CDN.

examples: Fitted Sheets, Flat Sheets & Sheet Sets
category.notes: Extract from BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. Position 2 is the subcategory. Full breadcrumb: Home > Bedroom > Fitted Sheets, Flat Sheets & Sheet Sets > Adairs > Product.

rating.notes: Note: ratingValue is '0' but 7 reviews with 5-star ratings exist. Data discrepancy in source.

review_count.notes: Same discrepancy — reviewCount=0 but 7 reviews in .review array. Use .review array length as alternative.

reviews.notes: Each review has: name, reviewRating (ratingValue/bestRating/worstRating), datePublished, author.name, reviewBody (optional), publisher.name.

variants.evidence: JSON-LD offers.type = 'AggregateOffer' with lowPrice=37.49 and highPrice=59.99
variants.notes: Price range indicates multiple variants (likely different sheet sizes: Single, Double, Queen, King, etc.). SKU format '61297_chocolate' suggests color variant. Different SKUs likely exist per size. Variant data not individually listed in JSON-LD — only aggregate range. HTML likely has variant selectors in React-rendered PDP component.
variants.variant_selector_type: unknown (React component, not testable without Playwright)

page_structure.image_cdn: Cloudflare cdn-cgi/image for optimization, globalassets for source images

mechanism_reassessment.justification: Confirmed. AU site (mirror of NZ) returns complete product data via direct HTTP with 200 status. JSON-LD contains all core fields (title, price range, currency, availability, brand, SKU, images, description, reviews, breadcrumbs). No JS rendering needed. No anti-bot protection. When NZ site exits maintenance, the same http_requests + JSON-LD approach will work.
mechanism_reassessment.critical_note: NZ site is CURRENTLY IN MAINTENANCE MODE. The scraper must handle this gracefully — if the NZ page returns maintenance content (no JSON-LD Product block), it should log an error/warning. The scraper should detect the absence of Product JSON-LD as a sign the page is not a valid product page.
mechanism_reassessment.nz_fallback_strategy: Optionally, the scraper could use hreflang links to find the AU equivalent URL and extract data from there, noting the currency will be AUD not NZD.

extraction_code_pattern.approach: Parse HTML with BeautifulSoup, extract all script[type='application/ld+json'] blocks, parse JSON, find the Product block
pseudocode: availability = availability_url.split('/')[-1] if availability_url else None

confidence_notes: High confidence on extraction method and field mapping based on AU mirror site analysis. JSON-LD provides comprehensive data with 15+ extractable fields. Confidence reduced from 0.9 because: (1) NZ site is in maintenance so selectors NOT directly tested on NZ HTML, (2) CSS fallback selectors not verified without Playwright, (3) variant-level extraction not verified. When NZ site becomes active, the same JSON-LD structure is expected.
